title: Legacy001 RealMLP ensemble 20 to 32
summary: Increase the RealMLP internal ensemble size in legacy-001 from 20 to 32 while changing nothing else.
rationale: If the root RealMLP benefits from variance reduction, a larger internal ensemble may improve AUC without adding a separate second model or a new model family. This is a single-parameter test of RealMLP stability.
implementation_hint: Start from legacy-001.py. Change only the RealMLP ensemble size, expected n_ens=20, to 32. Keep the same features, folds, epochs, architecture, preprocessing, target encoding, outputs, and validation protocol.
expected_effect: Improve OOF AUC if the current RealMLP ensemble is still variance-limited.
risk: Runtime and GPU memory usage increase, and the extra ensemble members may not add enough diversity.
